environment.notes: Token usage not directly exposed by Cursor CLI; timing is wall-clock. SDD development done in 2 passes with parallel subagents.

project_analysis.description: Clone and analyze target project structure

spec_generation.description: Reverse-engineer OpenSpec specifications from source code

sdd_development.description: SDD end-to-end code generation based on specs
sdd_development.notes: Pass 1 (4 subagents): Go core types, Go packages, Python CLI+SDK, K8s manifests. Pass 2 (4 subagents): client-go generated code, Python integrations+tests, docs site+design docs, Go tests+configs.

validation.description: Validate generated code against original project

totals.notes: Cursor CLI does not expose per-request token counts. Wall-clock time recorded.
